_comment_remove_before_committing: Template for a new GlossaryTerm entry in src/data/glossary-terms-enhanced.json. The master key (e.g. 'rollup-as-a-service') is the canonical term name, lowercased and matching the 'term' field. Delete this _comment field and rename the key to your canonical term before adding to the data file. Load docs/data-shape.md for field semantics and docs/translation-policy.md for picking script_rule.

rollup-as-a-service.definition: A managed service that lets teams launch and operate rollups without running the full infrastructure themselves.

aliases.note: Common acronym; expand on first use.

rollup-as-a-service.note: Distinct from a rollup-as-an-API service. The provider operates the sequencer / prover / DA pipeline on the customer's behalf.
